identity.name: SquashSense AI
identity.vibe: Elite Sports Tech meets Cyberpunk Analytics

mono.usage: Data tables, timestamps, coordinates, code snippets

primary.description: Volt Yellow - Represents the squash ball and high energy

secondary.description: Electric Cyan - For opponent data or secondary metrics

textures.grid: linear-gradient(to right, #18181B 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #18181B 1px, transparent 1px)
textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

VideoPlayer.description: Custom video player with overlay canvas for drawing shot trajectories. Controls should be minimal and floating.
VideoPlayer.styles: relative aspect-video bg-black rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-border shadow-2xl

CourtHeatmap.description: Top-down view of a squash court showing player movement density.

StatCard.description: Minimalist card with large metric and sparkline.
StatCard.styles: bg-card border border-border p-6 flex flex-col justify-between hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
StatCard.typography: Label: text-sm text-muted-foreground | Value: text-4xl font-bold font-primary tracking-tighter

RallyTimeline.description: Horizontal bar chart showing rally length and winner.
RallyTimeline.styles: w-full h-12 bg-secondary/10 rounded-sm overflow-hidden flex
RallyTimeline.usage: Green segment = Win, Red segment = Loss

hero_background.description: Dark abstract indoor arena texture. Use with heavy overlay (opacity 0.8).

equipment_texture.description: Close up of racket mesh/texture. Good for 'About' or 'Technology' section backgrounds.

fallback_player.description: Silhouette of player. Use only if 3D viz is not available.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients on text unless it's a very large heading (6xl+).
ALWAYS use the 'Volt Green' (#DFFF00) for the primary call-to-action button.
Data visualization colors must be accessible against the dark background.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all numbers and metrics to give that 'scoreboard' feel.
Dashboard widgets should use a 'glass border' effect: border-white/10.
Interactive elements must have a 'glow' effect on hover: shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(223,255,0,0.3)].
Avoid 'Tennis' imagery at all costs. If no Squash image is available, use abstract geometric shapes or wireframes.
Video player controls should be 'floating' and disappear when not hovering.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'Barlow Condensed', 'Inter', and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts or Fontsource. 2. Configure Tailwind with the custom colors defined in this JSON. 3. Build the 'Analysis Dashboard' first as it's the core value. 4. Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard. 5. Implement the video player with a transparent canvas overlay for future AI drawing drawing.
